amount_research_slots.name: amount_research_slots
amount_research_slots.description:
Checks if the current scope has the specified amount of research slots.

**Example:**
```paradox
amount_research_slots > 3
```

any_country.name: any_country
any_country.description:
Checks if any country meets the triggers.

**Example:**
```paradox
`any_country = { â€¦ }`
```

pc_is_loser.name: pc_is_loser
pc_is_loser.description:
Checks if the current scope is a loser within the peace conference.

**Example:**
```paradox
pc_is_loser = yes
```

any_occupied_country.name: any_occupied_country
any_occupied_country.description:
Checks if any country that is occupied by the one where this scope is located - meaning that the occupied country has core states controlled by the occupier country - meets the triggers.

**Example:**
```paradox
`any_occupied_country = { â€¦ }`
```

is_capital.name: is_capital
is_capital.description:
Checks if the current scope is a capital.

**Example:**
```paradox
is_capital = yes
```

can_research.name: can_research
can_research.description:
Checks if the current scope can start researching the specified technology.

**Example:**
```paradox
can_research = my_tech
```

all_country_with_original_tag.name: all_country_with_original_tag
all_country_with_original_tag.description:
Checks if all countries originating from the specified country, including the dynamic countries created for civil wars and other purposes, meet the triggers. `original_tag_to_check = TAG` is used to specify the original tag.

**Example:**
```paradox
all_country_with_original_tag = {
	original_tag_to_check = TAG  #required
	â€¦ # triggers to check
}
```

is_advisor.name: is_advisor
is_advisor.description:
Checks if the character in the current scope has an advisor role (includes advisors/theorists/high command).

**Example:**
```paradox
is_advisor = yes
```

is_cryptology_department_active.name: is_cryptology_department_active
is_cryptology_department_active.description:
Checks if the current scope has a cryptology department active.

**Example:**
```paradox
is_cryptology_department_active = yes
```

ai_irrationality.name: ai_irrationality
ai_irrationality.description:
Checks if the current scope AI has the specified irrationality.

**Example:**
```paradox
ai_irrationality > 10
```

career_profile_check_playthrough_ratio.name: career_profile_check_playthrough_ratio
career_profile_check_playthrough_ratio.description:
Compares the ratio (first/second) of two playthrough values to a number.

**Example:**
```paradox
career_profile_check_playthrough_ratio = {
	first = enemy_casualties
	second = total_own_casualties
	ratio = 4
	compare = greater_than_or_equals
}
```

has_border_war.name: has_border_war
has_border_war.description:
Checks if the current scope has a border war active.

**Example:**
```paradox
has_border_war = yes
```

intel_level_over.name: intel_level_over
intel_level_over.description:
Checks the intel level from the current country over a specified country.

**Example:**
```paradox
intel_level_over = {
    target = POL
    civilian_intel > 0.5
    army_intel = 0
    navy_intel < 0
}
```

owner.name: owner
owner.description:
In state scope, the country that owns the state. In combatant scope, the country that owns the divisions. In character scope, the country that has recruited the character. Subject to the 'invalid event target' error when used for a state.

**Example:**
```paradox
`owner = { add_ideas = owns_this_state }`
```

has_any_grand_doctrine.name: has_any_grand_doctrine
has_any_grand_doctrine.description:
Checks if any grand doctrine in folder is currently active for the country.

**Example:**
```paradox
has_any_grand_doctrine = land
```

has_state_flag.name: has_state_flag
has_state_flag.description:
Checks if the current scope has the specified flag.

**Example:**
```paradox
has_state_flag = my_flag
```

is_subject_of.name: is_subject_of
is_subject_of.description:
Checks if the current scope is a subject of the specified scope.

**Example:**
```paradox
is_subject_of = GER
```

has_occupation_modifier.name: has_occupation_modifier
has_occupation_modifier.description:
Checks if the current scope has an occupation modifier, changing resistance/compliance.

**Example:**
```paradox
has_occupation_modifier = modifier_name
```

has_trait.name: has_trait
has_trait.description:
Checks if the current scope has the specified trait.

**Example:**
```paradox
has_trait = really_good_boss
```

faction_power_projection.name: faction_power_projection
faction_power_projection.description:
Checks power value of current country's faction projection.

**Example:**
```paradox
faction_power_projection > 100
```

has_intelligence_agency.name: has_intelligence_agency
has_intelligence_agency.description:
Checks if the current scope has an intelligence agency.

**Example:**
```paradox
has_intelligence_agency = yes
```

has_character.name: has_character
has_character.description:
Checks if the current scope has the specified character recruited. The character does NOT need to be in power.

**Example:**
```paradox

```

is_leading_volunteer_group_with_original.name: is_leading_volunteer_group_with_original_country
is_leading_volunteer_group_with_original.description:
Checks if the current scope is leading a volunteer army within a country of the specified original tag.

**Example:**
```paradox
is_leading_volunteer_group_with_original_country = POL
```

has_country_leader.name: has_country_leader

naval_strength_comparison.name: naval_strength_comparison

is_female.name: is_female
is_female.description:
Checks if the current country leader is female.

**Example:**
```paradox
is_female = yes
```

has_mastery_level.name: has_mastery_level
has_mastery_level.description:
Checks if the country has reached the specified number of mastery levels (rewards) for the given subdoctrine.

**Example:**
```paradox

    amount = 2
    subdoctrine = mobile_infantry
}
```

any_other_country.name: any_other_country
any_other_country.description:
Checks if any country other than the one where this scope is located meets the triggers.

**Example:**
```paradox
`any_other_country = { â€¦ }`
```

all_character.name: all_character
all_character.description:
Checks if all characters that are recruited by the country where this scope is located meet the triggers.

```paradox
`all_character = { â€¦ }`
```

faction_leader.description:
Faction leader of the faction the country is a part of. Subject to the 'invalid event target' error.

**Example:**
```paradox
`faction_leader = { add_to_faction = FROM }`
```

original_tag.name: original_tag
original_tag.description:
Checks if the current scope originates from the specified country.

```paradox

```

```paradox

```

```

is_leading_army.name: is_leading_army

**Example:**
```paradox

```

naval_strength_ratio.name: naval_strength_ratio
naval_strength_ratio.description:
Checks if the current scope has the specified naval strength ratio against the specified country.

**Example:**
```paradox

    tag = GER

}
```

has_non_aggression_pact_with.name: has_non_aggression_pact_with

Checks if the current scope has a non-aggression pact with the specified country.

```

count_triggers.name: count_triggers

```

unit_organization.name: unit_organization

```

pc_is_liberated_by.name: pc_is_liberated_by

**Example:**

}
```

num_divisions_in_states.name: num_divisions_in_states

career_profile_check_ratio.name: career_profile_check_ratio
career_profile_check_ratio.description:
Compares the ratio (first/second) of two career profile values to a number.

**Example:**
```paradox
Possible the same as #career_profile_check_playthrough_ratio.
```

NOT.name: NOT
NOT.description:
Returns false if any sub-trigger returns true, true otherwise. Evaluation stops at the first true sub-trigger.

**Example:**
```paradox
NOT = {
    has_stability > 0.5
    has_war_support > 0.5
}
```

any_country_division.name: any_country_division
any_country_division.description:

```

is_operative_captured.name: is_operative_captured

```

mine_threat.name: mine_threat

```paradox

  array = array_of_states  #required
    â€¦                  #triggers to check
}
```

 Requires on of the following fields

```paradox
array = <array_of_states>
continent = <continent_name>
ai_area = <ai_area_name>
strategic_region = <strategic_region_number>

TAG.name: TAG
TAG.description:
The country defined by the tag or tag alias. Tag aliases are defined in /Hearts of Iron IV/common/country_tag_aliases, as a way to refer to a specific country (such as a side in a civil war) in addition to its actual tag. If the country with the exact tag doesn't exist, but a dynamic country originating from the specified tag does, the scope will refer to the dynamic country.

**Example:**
```paradox
`SOV = { country_event = my_event.1 }`
```

THIS.name: THIS
THIS.description:
Targets the current scope where it's used. For example, when used in every_state, it will refer to the state that's currently being evaluated. Primarily useful for variables (as in the example, where omitting it wouldn't work) or for built-in localisation commands, where some scope must be specified. More rarely, this may help with scope manipulation when using PREV. Since omitting it makes no difference in how the code gets interpreted, there is little to no usage outside of these cases.

**Example:**
```paradox
set_temp_variable = { target_country = THIS }
```

all_owned_state.description:
Check if all states that are owned by the country where this scope is located meet the triggers.

**Example:**
```paradox

```

strength_ratio.name: strength_ratio
strength_ratio.description:
Checks if the current scope has the specified strength ratio against the specified country. The ratio is the number of fielded divisions of the current scope divided by those of `tag` (or 1 if `tag` has no divisions). The ratio gets increased by 10% if the current scope has a stronger air forces.[2]

**Example:**
```paradox
strength_ratio = {
    tag = GER
    ratio > 1
}
```

all_military_industrial_organization.name: all_military_industrial_organization
all_military_industrial_organization.description:

**Example:**
```paradox
`all_military_industrial_organization = { â€¦ }`
```

has_max_planning.name: has_max_planning

**Example:**
```paradox
has_max_planning = yes
```

is_lend_leasing.name: is_lend_leasing
is_lend_leasing.description:

**Example:**
```paradox
is_lend_leasing = GER
```

add_trait.name: add_trait

```paradox
add_trait = {
     character = TAG_jane_smith

}

     character = TAG_my_leader

}

country_lock_all_division_template = {

set_mio_funds_gain_factor.name: set_mio_funds_gain_factor

set_mio_funds = 0.1
```

```

set_fuel_ratio.name: set_fuel_ratio

random_country_with_original_tag.name: random_country_with_original_tag

}
```

set_fuel.name: set_fuel
set_fuel.description:

**Example:**

set_fuel = 400
```

add_mio_task_capacity.name: add_mio_task_capacity
add_mio_task_capacity.description:

```

remove_decision_on_cooldown.name: remove_decision_on_cooldown

}

clr_unit_leader_flag.name: clr_unit_leader_flag

}

add_equipment_production.name: add_equipment_production

}

}

create_corps_commander = {
	name = "Jean de Lattre de Tassigny"

}

}

```

Displays a string in the user directory's /Hearts of Iron IV/logs/game.log file when executed, as well as showing up in the console if it is open when the logging effect was executed.

**Example:**

```

```paradox

```

remove_province_modifier.name: remove_province_modifier

start_border_war.name: start_border_war
start_border_war.description:
Starts a border war for the specified attacker and defender. The participating countries are the owners of the specified states.

**Example:**
```paradox
start_border_war = {
    change_state_after_war = no
    attacker = {
        state = 527
        num_provinces = 4
        on_win = japan_border_conflict.2
        on_lose = japan_border_conflict.3
        on_cancel = japan_border_conflict.4
        modifier = 0.1
        dig_in_factor = 0
        terrain_factor = 0
    }	
    defender = {
        state = 408
        num_provinces = 4
        on_win = japan_border_conflict.3
        on_lose = japan_border_conflict.2
        on_cancel = japan_border_conflict.4
    }
}
```

mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty.name: mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty

Refreshes the focus tree for the specified country, restarting the checks in `allow_branch` and position offsets for focuses.

**Example:**
```paradox
mark_focus_tree_layout_dirty = yes
```

```paradox

    type = light_cruiser
    target = NZL

}

```

reduce_focus_completion_cost.name: reduce_focus_completion_cost

create_navy_leader.name: create_navy_leader
create_navy_leader.description:
Creates a naval leader for the current scope with the specified attributes.

```paradox
create_navy_leader = {
	name = "FranÃ§ois Darlan"
	gfx = "GFX_portrait_FRA_francois_darlan"

}
```

create_operative_leader.name: create_operative_leader

add_state_resistance_compliance_modifier.name: add_state_resistance_compliance_modifier
add_state_resistance_compliance_modifier.description:
Adds either a resistance or compliance modifier to a state. Can only use modifiers from the /Hearts of Iron IV/common/resistance_modifiers.txt/compliance_modifiers.txt that are marked as `is_dynamic = yes`

**Example:**
```paradox
add_state_resistance_compliance_modifier  = {
       modifier = dynamic_modifier_name
	   state = 738
}
```

start_civil_war.name: start_civil_war
start_civil_war.description:
Starts a civil war for the current scope with the specified parameters.

**Example:**
```paradox
start_civil_war = {
    ruling_party = communism
    # Original country's ideology changes to communism
    ideology = ROOT
    # Breakaway gets old ideology of ROOT
    size = 0.8
    capital = 282
    states = {
        282 533 536 555 529 530 528
    }
    keep_unit_leaders = {
        750 751 752
    }
    keep_political_leader = yes
    keep_political_party_members = yes
}
```

```paradox
start_civil_war = {
    ideology = democratic
    size = 0.1
    states = all
    states_filter = {
        is_on_continent = europe
        is_capital = no
    }
    set_country_flag = TAG_my_country_tag_alias_trigger
    # Sets a country flag that gets used in a country tag alias.
}
```

(See country tag aliases)

```paradox
start_civil_war = {
    ideology = neutrality
    size = 0.1
    army_ratio = 0.5
    navy_ratio = 0
    air_ratio = 1
    keep_unit_leaders_trigger = {
        has_trait = my_trait_name
    }
    keep_all_characters = yes
    PREV = {  # Original country
        TAG_airforce_leader = { # Character
            set_nationality = PREV.PREV
            # Transfers to breakaway
        }
    }
    promote_character = TAG_airforce_leader
}
```

(See usage for PREV and PREV.PREV)

custom_effect_tooltip.name: custom_effect_tooltip
custom_effect_tooltip.description:

}

    controller = GER

}

Can also be used to modify trade relations by adding 'trade = yes' in the opinion <modifier> in /Hearts of Iron IV/common/opinion_modifiers/*.txt. If used with a trade opinion_modifier the behaviour is reversed, meaning that the target gains the trade opinion towards the **current scope**.

**Example:**

    target = GER
    modifier = faction_traitor
}

```paradox

**Example:**
```paradox
lerp = yes
```

dismantle_faction.name: dismantle_faction

add_days_mission_timeout.description:

set_political_power.name: set_political_power
set_political_power.description:
Sets the specified amount of political power for the current scope.

clr_country_flag.name: clr_country_flag

country_event.name: country_event

}

```

```

    policy = my_policy
    value = 10
}

ROOT.name: ROOT

}

remove_targeted_decision.name: remove_targeted_decision

}

remove_relation_modifier.name: remove_relation_modifier

}

    threat = 5

}
```

white_peace.name: white_peace

```

```paradox

    tag = GER
    message = my_peace_tt
}
```

set_power_balance.name: set_power_balance

    id = my_bop

}

reset_state_name.name: reset_state_name
reset_state_name.description:

**Example:**

```

add_advisor_role.name: add_advisor_role

remove_all_power_balance_modifiers.name: remove_all_power_balance_modifiers
remove_all_power_balance_modifiers.description:

**Example:**
```paradox
remove_all_power_balance_modifiers = {
    id = my_bop
}
```

modify_mio_flag.name: modify_mio_flag
modify_mio_flag.description:

**Example:**
```paradox
modify_mio_flag = {
    flag = my_flag
    value = 3
}
```

set_faction_spymaster.name: set_faction_spymaster
set_faction_spymaster.description:
Sets the current country as the faction spymaster.

**Example:**
```paradox

```

remove_resource_rights.name: remove_resource_rights
remove_resource_rights.description:
Removes given resource rights

**Example:**
```paradox
ENG = { remove_resource_rights = 477 }
```

activate_decision.name: activate_decision
activate_decision.description:
Activates the specified decision for the current scope, ignoring triggers for the decision.

**Example:**
```paradox

```

load_oob.name: load_oob
load_oob.description:
Loads the specified order of battle for the current scope, applying the effects within. The filename with the `.txt` extension omitted is used as the effect's target.

add_popularity.name: add_popularity
add_popularity.description:

**Example:**
```paradox
add_popularity = {
    ideology = fascism
    popularity = -0.5
}
```

add_civil_war_target.name: add_civil_war_target
add_civil_war_target.description:
Sets that the war between ROOT and TAG is a civil war, resulting in the victory being the annexation of the other side and setting world tension limits on intervention.

**Example:**
```paradox
add_civil_war_target = TAG
```

owner.name: owner
owner.description:
In state scope, the country that owns the state. In combatant scope, the country that owns the divisions. In character scope, the country that has recruited the character. Subject to the 'invalid event target' error when used for a state.

**Example:**
```paradox
`owner = { add_ideas = owns_this_state }`
```

set_sub_doctrine.name: set_sub_doctrine
set_sub_doctrine.description:

**Example:**

set_sub_doctrine = mobile_infantry
```

```paradox
set_sub_doctrine = {
    sub_doctrine = mobile_infantry
    folder = land
    track = 1
}
```

set_research_slots.name: set_research_slots
set_research_slots.description:
Sets the number of research slots the current scope has.

**Example:**
```paradox
set_research_slots = 4
```

add_to_war.name: add_to_war
add_to_war.description:
Forces the current scope to join the war of the specified ally against the specified enemy.

**Example:**
```paradox
add_to_war = {
    targeted_alliance = PREV
    enemy = HUN
    hostility_reason = asked_to_join
}
```

remove_from_faction.name: remove_from_faction
remove_from_faction.description:

**Example:**

```

modify_timed_idea.name: modify_timed_idea
modify_timed_idea.description:

**Example:**

    days = 60
}
```

change_division_template.name: change_division_template
change_division_template.description:

}
```

set_country_leader_description.name: set_country_leader_description

**Example:**

	desc = LOC_KEY
}
```

execute_operation_coordinated_strike.name: execute_operation_coordinated_strike

    amount = 12
}
```

set_state_owner.name: set_state_owner

```

}

clr_state_flag.name: clr_state_flag

**Example:**

`random_army_leader = { â€¦ }`
```

set_demilitarized_zone.name: set_demilitarized_zone

```paradox

```

}

Executes contained effects on every country that meets the limit.

  value = 3
}
```

```paradox

  specialization = all

}
```

```paradox

    type = bunker
    level = 1
    instant_build = yes
    province = 2999
}
```

```

add_field_marshal_role = {
  character = GER_Character_token
  skill = 4
  attack_skill = 2
  defense_skill = 3

  logistics_skill = 5
}
```

```

clr_mio_flag.name: clr_mio_flag
clr_mio_flag.description:
Clears a defined MIO flag.

**Example:**
```paradox
clr_mio_flag = my_flag
```

set_war_support.name: set_war_support
set_war_support.description:
Sets the current war support value for the current scope.

**Example:**
```paradox
set_war_support = 0.5
```

add_unit_leader_trait.name: add_unit_leader_trait
add_unit_leader_trait.description:
Adds the specified trait to the current unit leader.

**Example:**
```paradox
add_unit_leader_trait = old_guard
```

cancel_resistance.name: cancel_resistance
cancel_resistance.description:
Cancels resistance activity for the current state.

**Example:**
```paradox

```

}

Adds to the current stability value for the current scope.

**Example:**
```paradox

```

recall_attache.name: recall_attache
recall_attache.description:
Recalls the current scope's attachÃ© from the specified country.

**Example:**
```paradox
recall_attache = GER
```

add_collaboration.name: add_collaboration
add_collaboration.description:
Adds collaboration in TAG with the scoped country.

add_collaboration = {
    target = TAG

add_command_power.name: add_command_power
add_command_power.description:

**Example:**
```paradox
add_command_power = 100
```

declare_war_on.name: declare_war_on

add_autonomy_ratio.name: add_autonomy_ratio
add_autonomy_ratio.description:

upgrade_intelligence_agency.name: upgrade_intelligence_agency

random_purchase_contract.name: random_purchase_contract
random_purchase_contract.description:
Executes contained effects on a random purchase contract within the current country that meets the limit.

**Example:**
```paradox
`random_purchase_contract = { â€¦ }`
```

add_attack.name: add_attack
add_attack.description:
Adds attack skill to the current unit leader.

**Example:**
```paradox
add_attack = 1
```

remove_power_balance.name: remove_power_balance
remove_power_balance.description:
Removes the balance of power in entirety.

remove_power_balance = {

}

add_autonomy_score.name: add_autonomy_score

add_autonomy_score = {
    value = 10

THIS.name: THIS
THIS.description:
Targets the current scope where it's used. For example, when used in every_state, it will refer to the state that's currently being evaluated. Primarily useful for variables (as in the example, where omitting it wouldn't work) or for built-in localisation commands, where some scope must be specified. More rarely, this may help with scope manipulation when using PREV. Since omitting it makes no difference in how the code gets interpreted, there is little to no usage outside of these cases.

**Example:**
```paradox
set_temp_variable = { target_country = THIS }
```

complete_special_project.name: complete_special_project
complete_special_project.description:
Complete a special project for the country in scope. This effect will not take into account the current state of the project tree and will allow you to unlock a project even if the one before is not unlocked. Since the project is not completed within a facility, the facility state and scientist effects are NOT applied.

**Example:**
```paradox
complete_special_project = sp:sp_naval_midget_submarine
```

```paradox
complete_special_project = {
  project = sp:sp_naval_midget_submarine
  scientist = ITA_curio_bernardis
  state = my_state
  iteration_output = {
    my_reward
    my_other_reward
    my_third_reward = my_option_1
  }
  show_modifiers = no
}
```

deactivate_shine_on_focus.name: deactivate_shine_on_focus
deactivate_shine_on_focus.description:

**Example:**
```paradox
`deactivate_shine_on_focus = my_focus`
```

If the country with the exact tag doesn't exist, but a dynamic country originating from the specified tag does, the scope will refer to the dynamic country.
